'''√y-r-p''' ('''kayarap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debaptize|debaptize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debaptize|debaptize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √y-r-p
|-
! Lemma
| kayarap
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiyarap || jiyarap || shiyarap || kiyarap
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuyarap || jujuyarap || shushuyarap || kukuyarap
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuyarap || juyarap || shuyarap || kuyarap
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuyarap || juyarap || shuyarap || kuyarap
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theyarap || jeyarap || sheyarap || keyarap
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoyarap || jojoyarap || shoshoyarap || kokoyarap
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoyarap || joyarap || shoyarap || koyarap
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoyarap || joyarap || shoyarap || koyarap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || yarap || yarap || yarap || yarap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || yarap || yarap || yarap || yarap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || yarap || yarap || yarap || yarap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || yarap || yarap || yarap || yarap
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæyarap || jæyarap || shæyarap || kæyarap
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathayarap || jajayarap || shashayarap || kakayarap
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thayarap || jayarap || shayarap || kayarap
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thayarap || jayarap || shayarap || kayarap
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shayarap
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshayarap
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishayarap
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shayarapnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshayarapnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishayarapnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shayarapshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshayarapnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishayarapshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shayarapro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshayarapnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishayarapro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shayarapmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshayarapnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishayarapmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shayarapsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshayarapnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishayarapsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shayarapng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshayarapnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishayarapng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shayarapya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshayarapnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishayarapya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shayarapyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshayarapnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishayarapyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shayarapnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshayarapnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishayarapnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shayarapnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayarapnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayarapnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shayarapnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshayarapnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayarapnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shayarapshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshayarapnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishayarapshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shayarapshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayarapnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayarapshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shayarapshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshayarapnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayarapshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shayarapronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshayarapnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishayarapronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shayaraproshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshayarapnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishayaraproshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shayarapromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshayarapnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayarapromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shayarapmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshayarapnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishayarapmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shayarapmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshayarapnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishayarapmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shayarapmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayarapnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayarapmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
